auditedCommit.expected: c64ae68 Add proof claim layer manifest validator
auditedCommit.head: c64ae68 Add proof claim layer manifest validator

decisionConstraints: may grant git execution by Nodex authority only
must not wire AgentHandoffRunner to runtime adapters
must not grant proof-claim promotion authority
must not grant external review authority
must not grant Deep Research authority
must not grant commit authority outside explicit commit-gate seams
stopConditions: missing Post-ProcessExecutionAuthorityGrant Spine Audit v1 evidence
process execution authority not granted or wrong scope
git execution by Nodex already granted outside decision seam
source mutation or evidence deletion after plan
attempt to combine git authority with permission or AgentHandoff authority
